description: REST API backend for the TaskFlow project management SaaS
codingStandards: Use ruff for linting and formatting (line length 100)
All public functions must have docstrings (Google style)
Type hints required on all function signatures
Pydantic v2 models for all request/response schemas
One route per file in api/routes/
Database access only through repository pattern in db/repos/
architectureDecisions: Async SQLAlchemy sessions via FastAPI dependency injection
Service layer between routes and repositories for business logic
Background tasks via Celery + Redis (not FastAPI BackgroundTasks)
Config via pydantic-settings from environment variables only

conventions: One test file per route module
Factories via factory_boy for test data
CI fails if coverage drops below target

apiConventions.naming: camelCase in JSON, snake_case in Python
